name: wildlife_trade_sensor_fusion_marrowbridge_tru_loy
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Wildlife Trade Enforcement, the situation tagged internally around wildlife trade sensor fusion marrowbridge tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Arjun Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Arjun Ishikawa, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Wildlife Trade Enforcement. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Fatima Chandra
agents.identity: I am Fatima Chandra, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Wildlife Trade Enforcement. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on loyalty.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on loyalty for immediate traction on truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Arjun Ishikawa must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Arjun Ishikawa do?
